criteria.name: Note Structure
criteria.description: Notes are organized by topic/discussion block with clear headers and bullet points.

criteria.name: Speaker Attribution
criteria.description: Each key point is attributed to the correct speaker by name.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Notes capture all substantive discussion points without omitting key content.

criteria.name: Conciseness
criteria.description: Notes capture substance without verbatim transcription. Paraphrased for clarity.

criteria.name: Silent Observer
criteria.description: Agent never uses kutana_raise_hand, kutana_speak, or attempts to speak aloud. Text-only via chat.

criteria.name: Real-time Posting
criteria.description: Notes are posted at natural breakpoints (topic shifts, every 3-5 min), not accumulated to the end.
